title: A Letter To Hideaki Anno
wikitext:
[]: A Letter To Hideaki Anno             Quote Post by FrDougal9000 » Mon May 22, 2017 10:41 am I found out this morning that Hideaki Anno's birthday was today (thanks, birthday thread!) , and for whatever reason, I was inspired to write a letter dedicated to him. I don't speak or read Japanese, so there's not really a way I could translate this letter into something he'd understand, let alone send it his way. But I thought I'd post this letter here on Evageeks, and see what you think. Enjoy. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: A Letter To Hideaki Anno             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Wed Jun 21, 2017 12:44 am A great letter. I hope you can send it to him sometime If you want to see more of Hideaki Anno's work, you have to see his latest masterpiece. It's a very, very close second to the film it's remaking. Mr. Anno's writing and Shiro Sagisu's music are simply amazing in this film. https://youtu.be/M89VLZgo1Vg

Article: A Letter To Hideaki Anno
[]: A Letter To Hideaki Anno             Quote Post by FrDougal9000 » Mon May 22, 2017 10:41 am I found out this morning that Hideaki Anno's birthday was today (thanks, birthday thread!) , and for whatever reason, I was inspired to write a letter dedicated to him. I don't speak or read Japanese, so there's not really a way I could translate this letter into something he'd understand, let alone send it his way. But I thought I'd post this letter here on Evageeks, and see what you think. Enjoy. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: A Letter To Hideaki Anno             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Wed Jun 21, 2017 12:44 am A great letter. I hope you can send it to him sometime If you want to see more of Hideaki Anno's work, you have to see his latest masterpiece. It's a very, very close second to the film it's remaking. Mr. Anno's writing and Shiro Sagisu's music are simply amazing in this film. https://youtu.be/M89VLZgo1Vg
